creator: fbsdbug@kyll.me
text:
Thanks a lot Tijl. I paste the result of your command. I checked and I have the last version of ports excepted :

evolution-data-server-2.32.1_11    <   needs updating (index has 2.32.1_12)
gnome-control-center-2.32.1_4      <   needs updating (index has 2.32.1_5)
gnome-settings-daemon-2.32.1_5     <   needs updating (index has 2.32.1_6)
gnome-system-monitor-2.28.2_2      <   needs updating (index has 2.28.2_3)
gnome-utils-2.32.0_2,1             <   needs updating (index has 2.32.0_3,1)
libgcrypt-1.6.1_4                  <   needs updating (index has 1.6.1_5)
libsoup-2.40.3_5                   <   needs updating (index has 2.40.3_6)
vino-2.32.2_6                      <   needs updating (index has 2.32.2_7)
vlc-2.1.5_1,4                      <   needs updating (index has 2.1.5_7,4)
webkit-gtk2-1.8.3_4                <   needs updating (index has 1.8.3_5)

I try to recompile the ports listed in the command result and nothing.

BR
